How do you feel about learning through the teacher called Play?  

Sethmichaelmay.com
Insta @sethmichaelmaystudios

#play #innerchild #adultplay 

https://fs.blog/learning-through-play/?fbclid=IwRlRTSARohE9leHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZAo2NjI4NTY4Mzc5AAEex1Jey2UNt-Z9wN-IVJDXobYoy-I_dCYdxEBa5qFcaP3nDzZ2o7z_Qc2gxiE_aem_-5jrknNa4Hyqpts1arOwFg
items.previewDescription: Play is an essential way of learning about the world. Doing things we enjoy without a goal in mind leads us to find new information, better understand our own capabilities, and find unexpected beauty around us. Arithmetic is one example of an area we can explore through play.
items.title: Learning Through Play

items.text:
Hey folks! Renegade Theatre Company y  is looking to fill the positions of Lighting and Costume Designers for their summer community theatre production of A Midsummer Night's Dream. 
Rehearsals are Tues/Thurs nights and Sat mornings in the Virginia Highlands area. (For costume fittings - which need to begin ASAP)

Show dates are Thurs- Sun 6/11-6/20 (8pm shows Thurs-Sat, 2pm Show Sun and 6/20)
Strike 6/23
Tech Week 6/6-6/10

Preference for Lighting would be someone who is available majority tech/performances to set up and run light cues; for the Costumer availability for fittings/alterations/sourcing during rehearsals and tech.

We are an all volunteer team and most of the technical programming is user friendly - even for beginners! If you're interested or know someone who may be a good fit feel free to send me a DM or email RTC at renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'α midsummer night's A.COMEDYBYWITIAM.SHAKESPEAR A COMEDY BY WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE Sream Looking for CREW!! Lighting Designer Costume Designer Tech 6/6-6/10 Shows Th/F/Sat/Sun Th/F 6/11-6/20 URCH RENEGADE THEA THEATRECOMPANY HEATRE COMPANY'

items.text:
✨ STARS OF TOMORROW ✨
📍 @croydoncd_ Croydon

📅 Saturday 10th October

Models of Diversity is proud to present an unforgettable catwalk experience for young people aged 11–18 who have experienced adversity 💜

This empowering show is all about celebrating confidence, courage, individuality, and self-expression through fashion, fun, and creativity, with clothing from top brands including @newlook @nextofficial @prettylittlething @ganni and many more 

Our young stars will receive:

💄 Professional hair & make-up

👗 Wardrobe styling

🚶🏽‍♀️ Catwalk coaching

🎉 The chance to shine on the runway in front of family and friends

We’re looking for nominations from:

✔️ Teachers

✔️ Parents

✔️ Responsible adults

To nominate a young person, please email:

📧 info@modelsofdiversity.org

Please include:

• First name & age

• A recent photo

• A short paragraph explaining why they would benefit from taking part

• Parent/guardian consent and contact details

Let’s celebrate bravery, resilience, and the stars of tomorrow ⭐

#StarsOfTomorrow #ModelsOfDiversity #Croydon #YouthEmpowerment #InclusiveFashion BodyConfidence CatwalkExperience FashionForAll SelfExpression YoungPeople CroydonEvents

items.text:
🚨 NOW SEEKING YOUTH PERFORMERS FOR THE JUNETEENTH TOUR 🚨

The Juneteenth Tour is a multi-city East Coast run featuring performances at festivals, community events, summer celebrations, media opportunities + more during Juneteenth week 🎤✨

We are currently looking for up to 2 additional performers to join Ah’Lia Am’Unique (instagram.com/ahliaamunique) and Ximena P (instagram.com/ximenapryce) on tour.

Artists selected will gain opportunities including:
• Performing in multiple cities
• Regional audience growth
• Digital + physical marketing materials
• Ad campaigns + promo content
• Brand partnership opportunities
• Radio/media opportunities (interviews and possible airplay. We successfully helped get Ah’Lia Am’Unique’s song “Bicycle” featured on Atlanta’s V103 with DJ Greg Street just today!🔥)
• Industry guidance to help grow their brand + revenue streams

Requirements:
• Must be 15 years old or younger
• Must have at least 1 original song
• Must submit music + a performance video
• Must be available for ALL tour dates + TBD group rehearsal dates
• Must have a tour/travel budget
• Do not have to be local, but must be able to be in Atlanta when it starts (group rehearsals and meetings prior to can be virtual)

To be considered:
📧 info@rightpryceent.com

OR

📲 Post/tag/share your music + videos on IG using @RightPryceEnt #TheJuneteenthTour26

Follow Right Pryce Entertainment Group:
instagram.com/rightpryceent/

⏳ Submission deadline: May 15th

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'THE JUNETEE TOUR FEATURING Could it be yo?'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SUNDAY THE JUNETEE TOUR Ahlia பറய FEATURING 3Toa P A CELEBRATION OF FREEDOM, CULTURE & YOUNG EXCELLENCE Atlanta, GA DMU Englewood, NI Durham, NC Columbia, ር Atlanta, JUNE 14TH TUESDAY JUNE 16TH THURSDAY JUNE 18TH FRIDAY JUNE 19TH SATURDAY JUNE 20TH SUNDAY JUNE 21ST MUSIC. CULTURE. ENTERTAINMENT.'

sharedPost.text:
👠 AUDITIONS REOPENED 👠

The Panto Theatre is officially reopening auditions for the role of the Wicked Stepmother in Cinderella!

This deliciously dramatic role is perfect for performers who love comedy, big personality, and stealing every scene they enter. Because naturally the villain gets the best lines. Theatre has known this for centuries.

📅 Contract: Now – December 31, 2026
🎭 Volunteer Acting Position (No Pay)

We currently have 6 booked performances in Tooele and Provo, with additional shows expected to be added over time.

Please make sure to submit all conflicts in your audition email. Check the graphic for full audition instructions!

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Cinderella Audition eeee A lohn Yates Panto Announcment We are reopening auditions for the role of Wicked Step Mother Please send your resume and a video of you singing 30 seconds of any modern pop song to jords@thepantotheatre.com Submitions are due May 18 @5pm THE PANTO Thearre SHOW SHOWON ON ۱ THE GO'

MALE VOCALISTS (TUI Resorts Live)

Urgently Needed Casting Call — EU Male Vocalists 

We’re working with Live Business to connect exceptional male vocalists with upcoming resort  contracts across Europe.

This role is suited to strong, versatile performers who bring more than just vocals to the stage

.What we’re looking for

:• Confident, professional vocalists with strong contemporary repertoirewho can run daytime and evening activities 

• Comfortable hosting and engaging with guests — this is a key part of the role

• Experience in production shows and live entertainment settings

• Strong stage presence and adaptabilityThis is a great opportunity for performers who can balance performance with personality and guest interaction in an intimate 

Apply via: admin@evoquehub.com

Send CV, headshot and recent showreel See less

I don’t just try to make actors look 'good'.  I try to make them look like they’ve already been cast.

Like the headshot has been pulled straight out of a TV drama. Real context. A character that already feels believable.

Over 2,800 actors photographed across England and Wales. Message me to find out when i'm in your town. Spotlight-quality headshots in the convenience of your back garden.

www.chriskeenanheadshots.com

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Now Casting: Male Exotic Dancers (Major Cable Network, Paid + Cash Prize)

Are you a male exotic dancer with confidence, charisma, and stage presence?

Do you have the look, energy, and personality that command attention the moment you walk in the room?

Whether you perform regularly or just have that undeniable vibe, we want to hear from you.

Casting producers are looking for male exotic dancers in the greater Los Angeles area to take part in a fun, lighthearted social experiment competition series. If you’re comfortable on camera, have a great personality, and aren’t afraid to stand out, this is for you. This is a one-day shoot in Los Angeles. Selected participants will be PAID and will also have the opportunity to win a cash prize.

Apply directly here: [https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com](https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExNmtZc0E3MjR2TGNsOHV3SHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7_PMXih8cCumo5oukFTRtUVBXkdU4OxXYTCpKMn2W3Fmvt383kkBWXsIS31Q_aem_UTczKbMlICBMeSFHgSRo-g)

items.text:
Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for:

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 30-49

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and text that says 'elamy aamg alamu'

topComments.text: I sent an application i am available anytime. I do have a day job but i am able to book a day off.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — STUDENT SHORT — VANCOUVER — MAY 30–31 WEEKEND
Casting a short political satire/comedy sketch filming in Vancouver over the weekend of May 30–31.

Project: Student short / comedy sketch

Genre: Political satire / absurd comedy

Location: Vancouver, BC

Shoot Date: May 30 or 31, exact day TBD 

Time Commitment: Approx. 2 hours

Pay: Small honorarium

Roles:

DONALD TRUMP — Male, 45+

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Looking for an actor/impressionist who can do a strong Trump impression, especially the voice, rhythm, ego, posture, and comedic timing. 

Does not need to be an exact lookalike, but resemblance is a plus.

DOCTOR — Female-presenting, 25–45

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Professional, composed, polite, slightly uncomfortable. Strong deadpan comedy ability is a plus.

BODYGUARD — Male-presenting, 25–50

Pay: $30 for approx. 2 hours

Silent role. Serious, still, intimidating presence.

Please send:

Headshot or recent photoReel/performance clips, if available

Trump impression clip, if applying for the Trump role

Role you’re interested in

Availability for May 30–31

DM me or email: borovinskiymax@gmail.com 

Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
🚀 KRTEAGA · Digitalización, IA y automatización para empresas
Ayudo a empresas, marcas, autónomos, academias y proyectos culturales a dar el salto digital con criterio, estrategia y herramientas reales.

No se trata de llenar el negocio de tecnología por decorar, que para eso ya están las reuniones eternas y los PowerPoints con flechas azules. Se trata de ahorrar tiempo, ordenar procesos, captar mejor a los clientes y usar la inteligencia artificial de forma útil.

Tras formarme en Digitalización en Empresas con IA, ofrezco servicios orientados a pequeñas empresas, negocios creativos, academias, marcas personales y proyectos que quieren modernizarse sin perder su identidad.

Servicios disponibles

🔹 Auditoría digital para empresas
Análisis del estado actual del negocio: presencia online, procesos, comunicación, captación de clientes, herramientas digitales y oportunidades de mejora.

🔹 Implementación de inteligencia artificial
Creación de sistemas, prompts, asistentes y flujos de trabajo con IA para mejorar tareas diarias, comunicación, contenido, organización y productividad.

🔹 Automatización de procesos
Diseño de flujos con herramientas digitales para reducir tareas repetitivas: formularios, emails, bases de datos, clientes, reservas, contenidos y seguimiento comercial.

🔹 CRM básico para negocios
Organización de contactos, clientes, alumnos o leads mediante sistemas sencillos y funcionales para mejorar el seguimiento y la gestión.

🔹 Formación en IA para equipos
Sesiones prácticas para empresas, academias o profesionales que quieren aprender a usar la IA de forma clara, ética, útil y aplicada a su trabajo real.

🔹 Digitalización para academias, artistas y proyectos culturales
Webs, formularios, automatizaciones, estrategia de contenido, captación de alumnos o clientes y sistemas digitales adaptados al sector artístico.

🔹 Optimización de redes sociales con IA
Calendarios de contenido, textos, ideas, guiones, publicaciones, estrategia y organización para marcas que necesitan comunicar mejor.

🔹 Diseño de sistemas digitales personalizados
Cada negocio tiene su propio caos. Yo ayudo a convertir ese caos en estructura.

📩 Para información, propuestas o colaboraciones:

📲lamarca.krteaga@gmail.com

IG : @krteaga 

𝐊  🅡  𝐓  𝐄  𝐀  𝐆  𝐀 

Digitalización · IA · Automatización · Estrategia visual · Cultura · Empresa

​For incredible bmx freestyle tricks, we bring high-energy entertainment that guarantees to leave your crowd speechless. Whether it’s a corporate launch, festival, music video, or private event, we deliver a world-class performance tailored to your brand.

​💥 What We Offer:

​Live Performance Sets: High-octane freestyle shows.

​Brand Activations: Dynamic content for product launches.

​Workshops: Engaging sessions for youth and sports clinics.

​Media Appearances: Expert riders for commercials and film.

​📩 Get In Touch:

​We are ready to roll. Contact us today to discuss rates and availability!

​WhatsApp: +233 54 582 6883

​Email: bmxghana@gmail.com

​#BMXGhana #GhanaSports #ExtremeSports #ActionSports #FreestyleBMX #EventEntertainment #AccraEvents

Step into confidence, elegance, and runway presence.
Experience an exclusive Sit-In Class designed for aspiring models, pageant enthusiasts, and individuals who want to enhance their poise and personality.

💃 Learn the basics of:
• Pasarela And Trademark Walk 
• Proper Posture & Projection
• Stage Confidence

• Basic Strand and Poising Techniques

🌟 Open to all aspiring beauty queens, models, and beginners.
Observe, learn, and experience the training environment firsthand!

RESERVE YOUR SPOT

Look for Ms. Joycie

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I'm a photographer based in Berlin and I'm planning a series of fashion shoots around the city in the next few months, and am looking for fresh, up and coming Make Up Artists, Hair Stylists and Stylists interested in joining these projects.

These are tfp shoots, which is why they're a good occasion for younger talents to join me and my fun lovely little team! :)

Just hit me up if you're interested!

Cheers

(you can find my work on lalefavre.com)

items.text:
L’association Ame Dambé et Binkiss Sangaré organisent un stage de danse de 3 JOURS sous le soleil de MARSEILLE 🤩🥳

Pour l’occasion, un magnifique bouquet final vous a été concocté 🥳🤩

Nous avons l’honneur de recevoir 2 grands artistes DANSEURS:

💛 SOPHIE SABAR et 
💛 MAKITI 

Pour compléter ce merveilleux long week-end, nous avons aussi l’honneur de recevoir 3 grands artistes de la MUSIQUE AFRICAINE:

🩵 PETIT ADAMA
🩵 MOHAMED CAMARA 
🩵 MAF SINGSING

💚 Évidemment BINKISS partagera aussi la scène 

Le stage se déroulera du SAMEDI 23 MAI au LUNDI 25 MAI, ça va être un long week-end festif 🥳😍🥳

☀️☀️☀️  ☀️☀️☀️  ☀️☀️

💫 INFOS HORAIRES 💫

💡SAMEDI💡

9h30 à 12h00 GUINEE avec MAKITI

12h30 à 15h00 MALI avec BINKISS 

15h30 à 18h00 SABAR avec SOPHIE 

💡DIMANCHE 💡

10h à 12h30 MALI avec BINKISS

13h à 15h30 SABAR avec SOPHIE 

16h à 18h30 GUINEE avec MAKITI

💡LUNDI 💡

10h30 à 13h00 
DUO BINKISS MAKITI

13h30 à 16h00
DUO BINKISS SOPHIE

Ensuite... la fête continue avec un APEROOOOO PARTAGÉ dans le MAGNIFIQUE JARDIN de la Salle ZIN’ART 🥳🥳🥳

🌟 INFOS SALLES 🌟

SAMEDI
Salle LES LICES 
12, rue des Lices, 
13007 MARSEILLE 

DIMANCHE ET LUNDI
Salle ZIN’ART
11 rue Mallot
13016 MARSEILLE 

☀️ INFOS PRIX ☀️

1 STAGE 40€
2 STAGES 70€
JOURNÉE ENTIÈRE ou 3 COURS AVEC LE MÊME ENSEIGNANT 100€
WEEK-END ENTIER 150€

5€ d'adhésion obligatoire 

L'inscription est confirmée à réception des arrhes qui correspondent à la moitié du montant 🙏

🙏 Les arrhes ne sont pas remboursables si annulation de votre part 🙏

Les PLACES sont LIMITÉES 🙏☀️

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour toute information complémentaire.

INSCRIPTIONS :

ame.dambe.asso@gmail.com
06 74 99 96 34 (via whatsapp)
06 69 00 18 64

items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

Both classes are BRAND NEW ROUTINES so it’s a great time to jump and start fresh! 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**
**for the short film: *****KEPT GOING***
**Written & Directed by **Jordan Jackson

**Ever wanted to be part of a comedy show that goes HORRIBLY wrong?**

**We’re looking for audience extras to fill out a comedy club scene for our upcoming short film *****Kept Going***** — a dark comedy/survival short made as part of a 13-film challenge series.**

**📅 FILMING DATE: MAY 17TH, 2026**

**You’ll be:**

·         **reacting to stand-up comedy**

·         **witnessing a comedian absolutely destroy his own career in real time**

·         **laughing, gasping, judging, cringing, and helping create the chaotic energy of the film**

** **

**AND:**

**1.   You WILL be seen on camera**

**2.   Includes IMDb Credit**

**3.   Great chance to network & be part of a fun indie set experience**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎭 ROLE:**
**Comedy Club Audience Members**
**(all looks/types welcome)**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎬 ABOUT THE FILM**

***Kept Going***** follows Nate, a cocky stand-up comedian who refuses to stop digging himself deeper after making jokes at the expense of the wrong person. What starts as an awkward comedy set spirals into a bizarre survival nightmare deep in the woods involving kidnappers, fake ancestry, family secrets… and a wooden moose.**

**Tone-wise imagine:**

**1.   awkward stand-up comedy**

**2.   wilderness survival chaos**

**3.   psychological humiliation**

**4.   the dumbest possible decisions made with complete confidence**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📍 Filming Location:**
**Colorado Springs, Colorado**

**🕒 Shoot Duration:**
**2 Hours & 30 Minutes**
**(3:30 PM – 6:00 PM)**

**Compensation:**
**Non-paid**
**IMDb Credit + footage + guaranteed visibility on screen**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📩 TO JOIN:**
**Message me directly or email:**
**[jjacks24@uccs.edu](mailto:jjacks24@uccs.edu)**

**Include:**
**• Name**
**• Age**
**• Recent photo/selfie**
**• Availability**

**Come laugh at a man ruining his life in real time.**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text: Can teens under 18 be considered or only adults?

Updated: Need 3 Male Actors for Table Reading
Genre: A coming‑of‑age.

Title: Her Name Was Maria. 

The actors who can read: 2 teenage boys (14-15) and 1 male (late 20-30) are needed.

Date and Time:  May 23, 2026, 10 AM–2 PM (likely done by 1 PM)  

Location: Ross Cherry Creek Branch Library

What I’m offering:

$20 stipend

Snacks of your choice

Fresh kimbap for everyone

If this sounds fun or meaningful to you, please comment or message me. I’d love to work with you.

items.text:
Male Model/actor needed 4/21 for Music Video
Male model / actor would only be needed for about 2-3 hours in the TV scene where he would be holding a camcorder filming the artist and interacting with her, then also sitting on a chair watching the footage. We would need some photos of him prior to the shoot date to hang up all over the office for the detective / stalker scene as well.

The video will be cinematic, film-aesthetic and story-driven, centered around one group dance scene and two performance-based setups. This is unpaid, but copy, and full credit will be provided, and it’s intended to be a strong portfolio piece for everyone involved. 

Age - 25 - 35

Height - over 6ft

If interested please email photos and height to lealouisa1@gmail.com or DM on IG @lea.louisa

items.text:
Guys okay so this "agent" reached out and had me come in for an interview. Off the rip it was weird, her "agency" wasn't even on the name of the building Plaza. Then she, without my consent, gave my number to a random photographer who claimed to have been working since 1987. I asked for a gallery of his or a portfolio and he gave me his INSTAGRAM?? His Instagram is Gold G716, I implore you to go have a look and ask yourself if THATS the work of someone who's been doing this for like 30+ years. He also had wildly inappropriate hashtags on a picture he took of a literal kid on his Instagram, and I will post that picture (not showing the kid obvi) for you all to see. He then tells me I need like 4 mini skirts and a mini dress for my HEADSHOTS?? Then he says he's gonna give me his address and I'm like okay forsure he's gonna give me the address to his photography studio, guys the address he gave me was his Home. Address. 

I asked to bring my brother and he got weird about it!! Then he says "this is what your agent wanted" I literally NEVER signed a contract and met this lady ONCE. So obviously I cancel on this guy because it sounds like a trafficking just waiting to happen, and then the "agent" called me around 9:15 that night and basically berates me for not knowing that going to a photographers house is "industry standard"?? And I'm not crazy, like that's not standard right? Then she says I need to me more open minded when I tell her I'm just interested in Acting. I say okay, and then she says she wants monologues. I say forsure, as I expect this, and I tell her I'm also recording a couple (comedic and dramatic) to put in my reel. She says this is NOT how it works? Huh? Her name that she gave me was Chelsea A, she was a black woman who gave kris Jenner vibes lowkey (which isn't a bad thing really) and the address of this "agency" is Beverly Hills 
9171 Willshire Blvd, CA
90210 if that sounds familiar to anyone. She then told me that photographer i use needs to "slim" me down in the photos. After I asked her about what was going on, what the name of her "agency" was (Nova is what she told me) and how she was gonna put me out for a gig when I haven't even signed a contract nor recieved an email, she sent a very poorly worded text saying she wasn't gonna move forward with me. I will be including those texts as well. Be real guys, was this a scam? The other pictures are text between me and the "photographer"

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of phone and text

May be an image of ‎text that says '‎6:31 03:27 12% +1818 6:29 PM Tuesday,April April 14 The address to meet me 7533 Jumilla Ave., Winnetka, CA 91306. When you get my place, text me and come out to creature clothes. Then will drive outside location that pitch your colors. 6:24 PM 6:25 PM Okay forsure and what was your name? Enter message ফ 1 234567890 7 2 3 4 5 6 qwertyuiop w r asdfghk h a S k ZxCvbnm x b n !#1 x English (US) را‎'‎

Cześć,

do etiudy animowanej IV-ego roku Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi szukamy aktora głosowego o starszym tonie głosu.

Sesja nagraniowa odbędzie się na kampusie szkoły, samego dialogu nie jest dużo, a całość nie zajmie więcej niż godzinę.
Termin dostosujemy po rozmowie z aktorem.

Z tego również powodu jest to oferta non profit. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z demem aktorskim prosimy wysyłać na maila:
room208.biz@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING DO REKLAMY 
Do realizacji reklamy poszukujemy dwóch aktorów w wieku około 30 –40 lat.
Szukamy osób z ciekawą osobowością oraz charakterystycznym wyglądem — naturalność i dobra energia przed kamerą są dla nas bardzo ważne.  
 Lokalizacja: okolice Warszawy / Krakowa (lub inne do ustalenia)
 Praca na 1 dzień zdjęciowy
Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość mail wraz ze zdjęciami oraz krótkim przedstawieniem się. Zgłoszenia proszę kierować na adres mailowy.  casting@awakefilms.pl

items.text:
Hi everyone. I’m urgently casting lead roles for a vertical drama series shooting in London.

Filming 18-20th may. You must be able to do allll these dates !!!!!

YOU MUSTTTTT BE ABLE TO GET A SELF TAPE TO ME BY TOMORROW MIDDAY IF YOU APPLY AND ARE SELECTED - don’t apply if you can’t do this!!!!!! The script is very short 

ROLE 1: MALE. Jude (lead) 25-35 years old
£300-350 per day tbc so between £900-1,050 for 3 days
Ref: Edward Lewis from pretty woman. A calm powerful man posing as a driver but secretly a ceo.

Role 2: MALE. travis - antagonist. Age 25-35 
£200-250 per day. So 600-750 for 3 days
Ref: Patrick Bateman from American psycho.  Wealthy, obsessive controlling finance.

Role 3: MALE. James 25-35 years
£130 per day so 390 for 3 days.
Loyal assistant to Jude. 

ROLE 4: FEMALE. Kate (lead) age 20-30
£300-350 per day for 3 days so £900-1,050 tbc
Character ref: Anastasia steel from 50 shades of grey 

Role 5: FEMALE. corrine. Age 45-55
£130 per day so £390 for 3 days
Ref: cold mother obsessed with status and perfection 

Please DM me  if available. I must have headshots / spotlight link to forward you

topComments.text: For Kate the character reference is from 50 shades does that mean there could be some exposure in the film?
Be careful people, sounds too good to be true......

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EASTERN EUROPEAN NEWS PRESENTER/ ACTRESS

We are looking for an actress who can convincingly convey a professional news presenter for a TV show. The ideal candidate should visually and vocally read as Eastern European or Russian-adjacent in tone and presence. Authentic accent work is welcome. 

LOOK & STYLE:
Glamorous, immaculate, highly polished
Institutional and authoritative rather than soft or casual

She makes escalation sound reasonable, contempt sound professional, and propaganda sound like breaking news.

PERFORMANCE & PRESENCE:
We’re looking for someone who feels credible, composed, and commanding on camera. The ideal candidate should naturally convey confidence, certainty, and professionalism in a high-pressure news environment. With the ability to deliver scripted material with conviction and authority.

To apply, please email a recent selfie to-
[lisa.gomer.howes@thefarm.tv](mailto:lisa.gomer.howes@thefarm.tv)

Subject line:

NEWS 

Location- UK based

This is a paid role.

items.text:
Darmowa sesja zdjęciowa: Kobiecość i pewność siebie 📸✨
Szukam chętnych dziewczyn do sesji nie musisz mieć doświadczenia. Buduję portfolio, więc sesja jest całkowicie bezpłatna.

​O co chodzi?

Krótko: subtelne kadry, dużo gry światłem i pokazywanie kobiecej pewności siebie. Bez sztuczności, w Twoim tempie.

​Wymagania:

​Twoja przestrzeń: Sesja u Ciebie w domu/mieszkaniu (sypialnia, salon) lub w plenerze.

​Zgoda na publikację: Zależy mi na pokazaniu efektów w moim portfolio.

​Chcesz poczuć się wyjątkowo i dostać klimatyczne zdjęcia? Napisz priv po szczegóły! 📩

​#sesjafotograficzna #darmowasesja #kobiecość #fotografiaportretowa #sesjawdomu #portfolio

🎬 FILM FABULARNY - BIELSKO-BIAŁA I OKOLICE 🎬
Na zdjęcia realizowane w dniach 26/27/28.05.2026 poszukujemy statystów i epizodystów do produkcji filmowej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Bielsko-Biała i okolice

🔸 DUBLERKA ZNANEJ AKTORKI
Poszukujemy kobiety zgodnej z opisem:
• ciemne długie włosy
• wzrost 170–175 cm
• rozmiar ubrań 36–38

📅 Dostępność: 26–28.05 (3 dni zdjęciowe)
💰 Stawka: 200 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy
📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DUBLERKA”

——————————————

📅 26.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🏄‍♂️ MŁODY SURFER
• spalony słońcem
• epizod niemy - granie nieboszczyka

💰 180 zł
📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SURFER”

——————————————

🏄 SUP
Szukamy osób potrafiących pływać na SUP-ie.

💰 300 zł – z własnym sprzętem
💰 250 zł – bez własnego sprzętu

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SUP”
W treści maila napisz, czy posiadasz własną deskę z wiosłem.

——————————————

🚤 OSOBA Z PATENTEM MOTOROWODNYM
• epizod niemy

💰 300 zł
📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „MOTORÓWKA”

——————————————

📅 27.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

⛸ DZIECI JEŻDŻĄCE NA ŁYŻWACH (6–14 lat)
• epizod niemy

💰 200 zł – z własnymi łyżwami
💰 150 zł – bez własnych łyżew

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „ŁYŻWY”
W treści maila podaj informację, czy dziecko posiada własne łyżwy. Jeśli nie - poprosimy o rozmiar buta.

——————————————

🏒 NASTOLETNI HOKEIŚCI (12–18 lat)
• epizod niemy

💰 200 zł – z własnymi łyżwami
💰 150 zł – bez własnych łyżew

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „HOKEISTA”
W treści maila podaj informację, czy posiadasz własne łyżwy. Jeśli nie - poprosimy o rozmiar buta.

——————————————

📅 28.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🎭 MĘŻCZYZNA 18–35 LAT
• epizod mówiony

⚠️ Dla tej roli dołącz WIDEOWIZYTÓWKĘ

💰 260 zł
📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „105 KOLEGA”

——————————————

🌍 OSOBY ETNICZNE DO ROLI TURYSTÓW
• statyści

💰 150 zł
📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „TURYSTA”

——————————————

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać mailowo na adres: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W treści zawrzyj poniższe informacje:

Imię i Nazwisko

wiek

wzrost

numer telefonu

zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetki

rozmiar ubrań ( dotyczy roli “DUBLERKA”)

wideowizytówkę ( dotyczy roli “105 KOLEGA”)

Pamiętaj o zatytułowaniu swojego maila nazwą roli.
Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬

items.text:
TEATRO da TERRA estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

7 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Hochzeit gesucht

Für ein studentisches Fotoprojekt suche ich Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Hochzeit im Kanton Zürich. Vorkenntnisse oder eine bestimmte berufliche Tätigkeit sind nicht erforderlich.

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video-/Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet im Mai/Juni statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. Für Essen und Getränke ist selbstverständlich gesorgt.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of amaranth and wedding

topComments.text: Wo genau findet das Projekt statt... gibt es eine Unterkunft... Fahrspesen??? lg Anna

KOMPARSEN GESUCHT für 80er Filmset , 09.05.2026 Hamburg 

(oder 16.05 als Jugendliche einer Schulklasse, Spielalter 15-22)

Hallo alle miteinander,

für meinen Bachelor Abschlussfilm suchen wir noch Komparsen um unser Bild zu füllen. 

Die Szenerie spielt in den 1980er Jahren, dafür suchen wir u.a. Militär Soldaten und Fake-Filmcrew (m/w/d) Komparsen jeden Spielalters (ab 18) 

Wir drehen am 09.05, ganztags in Hamburg Billwerder Billdeich.

Da wir eine studentische freie No-Budget-Produktion sind, können wir leider keine Vergütung oder Aufwandsentschädigung anbieten. 

Dafür haben wir ein großartiges Team mit professionellem Arbeitsklima als auch Film Produktionsstandart und für Catering sowie Verpflegung wird auch gesorgt sein!

Darüber hinaus wird der Film eine offizielle Premiere in einem Hamburger Kino feiern.

Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein?

Gerne per Mail kontaktieren: kurzfilm.schwitzen@gmail.com

Beste Grüße

Mateusz "Mati" Misiarz

items.text:
**Casting Call Tagesrolle “Chefin” für studentischen Abschlussfilm “Streng dich mal an!” In Darmstadt**

***Logline "Streng dich mal an!":***

Die Jugendfreundinnen Maya und Katrin verlieren sich: Katrin versinkt im Chaos ihres ADHS und Maya in ihrer toxischen Beziehung. Als Erwachsene begegnen sie sich erneut und es liegt nun an Katrin, die inzwischen gelernt hat, mit ihrem ADHS zu leben, Maya aus ihrer Beziehung zu helfen – insofern diese bereit ist, sich auf sie einzulassen.

***Rollenbeschreibung:***

Katrins Chefin ist Abteilungsleiterin in einem Unternehmen im Buchhandel.

Sie ist eine souveräne, etwas eigene Frau mit einer natürlichen Autorität, die sich durch die Reihen hochgekämpft hat.

Zu Katrin hat sie ein gutes Verhältnis und verlässt sich auf sie als kompetente Mitarbeiterin.

Spielalter: 35-50

Erscheinungsbild: Weiblich gelesen, PoC 

*Dreh*

* **20.05.** in Darmstadt (Bewerber*innen aus der Region bevorzugt)
* Mittags bis früher Abend
* Da es sich um ein studentisches Projekt handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Verpflegung und Fahrtkosten decken wir jedoch.
* 

Bei Interesse meldet euch bitte bis zum 08.05. mit einem Link zu eurem reel unter sdma.kurzfilm@gmail.com !

items.text:
Собираем классную компанию девушек в наш невероятный тур по Юте и Аризоне ✨ 

У нас осталось всего 2 последних места.

Это одно из наших самых любимых направлений - мы возвращаемся сюда уже в 9-й раз, потому что атмосфера, природа и эмоции здесь каждый раз по-особенному красивые 💫

Вас ждут 5 дней невероятных видов, приключений, красивых локаций и настоящей перезагрузки в классной женской компании.

Во время путешествия мы:

🏞️ посетим Zion National Park
🌄 увидим Bryce Canyon National Park
✨ отправимся на каньон Horseshoe Bend
🏔️ остановимся у Glen Canyon Dam
🛶 покатаемся на каяках на Lake Powell
📍 увидим потрясающий Antelope Canyon

Что включено:

✨ 5 дней / 4 ночи проживания в красивом доме
✨ Полный трансфер на протяжении всего путешествия
✨ Все входные билеты в парки
✨ Питание во время тура (кроме 2 обедов и 1 ужина)
✨ Медитации и практики благодарности
✨ Красивые остановки для фото и контента
✨ Атмосфера поддержки, вдохновения и новых знакомств

Стоимость тура от $1390 🤍

Если давно мечтала о незабываемом Girls Trip — возможно, это твой знак ✨ 

Если хочешь присоединиться, напиши мне в личные сообщения, чтобы я успела закрепить за тобой одно из последних мест.

Также этим летом у нас много красивых направлений ☀️ 

Все поездки можно посмотреть здесь:

[https://www.instagram.com/gofitjourney/](https://www.instagram.com/gofitjourney/)

items.text:
Casting Call: 🎥
Project Title: Decisions Are Never Black and White “Only The Blood”
Production Type: [Film/TV/Stage/Web Series]
Union Status: [Non-Union]
Compensation: [Paid]
Shooting Dates: June 22nd, 23rd and 24th
Location: Greensboro NC (Must be a local hire to Greensboro)
No Travel or Lodging provided

Only the Blood is a gripping psychological drama centered on twin sisters bound by blood—but divided by jealousy, desire, and betrayal.
Tenille has always dreamed of becoming a mother, but after facing the painful reality that she cannot conceive, she turns to the one person she trusts most—her identical twin, Moni. On the surface, Moni agrees to carry Tenille’s child out of love and loyalty. But beneath that decision lies a deeper, darker motive.
As old wounds resurface, Moni’s hidden resentment toward her sister begins to surface. What begins as an act of sacrifice quickly turns into manipulation, as Moni uses the surrogacy arrangement as leverage—blackmailing Tenille’s husband into an intimate relationship to satisfy her own desires and long-held jealousy.
Lines are crossed, trust is shattered, and the emotional stakes intensify as each character becomes entangled in a web of deception, power, and betrayal.
As secrets unfold, the sisters are forced to confront a painful truth: sometimes the deepest betrayals don’t come from strangers… they come from within the family.

TRAY

Age 25-35
Attractive, grounded, and outwardly devoted, Tray is the kind of man people trust instantly. He presents as a loving husband who wants to give his wife everything—especially the child she desperately longs for.

Beneath that surface, Tray is conflicted and emotionally weak when pressured. His need to “keep the peace” makes him vulnerable to manipulation. When Moni introduces blackmail into the equation, Tray finds himself trapped in a situation he never imagined—crossing moral lines he once believed he’d never approach.

He carries quiet guilt, often masking it with reassurance and affection toward Tenille. Tray is not a villain, but his inability to stand firm ultimately fuels the betrayal at the center of the story.

Personality Traits:
Charming, conflicted, passive under pressure, emotionally torn, protective but flawed

Key Notes for Casting:

Must be comfortable with on screen kissing, and implied sexual acts. No nudity.
Must be able to portray internal conflict and layered emotion

Strong chemistry required with both Tenille and Moni
Needs subtlety—his struggle is more internal than explosive
Should evoke empathy even while making questionable choices

Must be available all 3 days
Lead $150/Day
 
MONI

Age 25-35
Moni is Tenille’s identical twin—equally captivating on the outside, but emotionally far more complex beneath the surface. Where Tenille is open and trusting, Moni is guarded, calculating, and quietly driven by years of comparison and buried jealousy.

Agreeing to carry her sister’s child appears selfless, but for Moni, it’s an opportunity. Using charm, manipulation, and carefully applied pressure, she blackmails her sister’s husband into an intimate relationship—feeding a desire for control and validation that has long been unresolved.

Moni thrives in the shadows, presenting warmth and loyalty to her sister while orchestrating a hidden agenda. She is not outwardly villainous—her power lies in subtlety, restraint, and the ability to shift between sincerity and underlying menace.

Seeking an actress with strong range who can embody duality—someone who can play both loving sister and calculated manipulator, with emotional depth, intensity, and control.

Must be comfortable with on screen kissing, and implied sexual acts. No nudity

Must be available all 3 days
Lead $150/Day
 
TENILLE

Age 25-35
Tenille is warm, hopeful, and deeply driven by her desire to become a mother—something she wants more than anything. After struggling with infertility, she places her full trust in her identical twin sister, believing she has found the answer to her prayers. With unwavering faith, she reassures her husband that this journey will bring them closer and finally give them the family they’ve dreamed of.

Completely unaware of the manipulation unfolding around her, Tenille remains genuine, loving, and trusting—making her the emotional heart of the story. Her innocence and belief in the people closest to her heighten the tension, as the audience watches her unknowingly build her future on a fragile foundation of deception.

Seeking an actress who can portray sincerity, emotional openness, and quiet strength, with the ability to carry deep dramatic weight while remaining authentically grounded.

Must be available all 3 days
Supporting $100/Day
 

BRIDGETTE

Age 25-35
Bridgette is Moni’s close friend—loyal, observant, but somewhat detached when it comes to other people’s drama. She has a playful, sarcastic personality and often assumes people exaggerate or joke when they say outrageous things.

When Moni confides in her about the plan to sleep with Tray, Bridgette doesn’t take it seriously. She brushes it off as one of Moni’s wild, attention-seeking moments, laughing it away instead of recognizing the depth of what’s being said. Because of this, she never steps in or challenges Moni’s thinking.

Bridgette’s inaction isn’t rooted in malice—it’s a mix of disbelief, avoidance, and not wanting to involve herself in something that feels messy or unbelievable. However, her failure to speak up or question Moni ultimately makes her an unintended enabler in the situation.

Key Traits:

Playful, sarcastic
Emotionally detached from conflict
Avoidant when things get serious
Loyal, but not confrontational
Underestimates the seriousness of others’ actions

Role in Story:
Bridgette serves as a subtle reflection of how dangerous silence and dismissal can be. She represents the bystander who could have intervened—but didn’t, because she didn’t think it was real.

Must be available all 3 days, will only film one day.
 Supporting $100/Day

DAVID

Age 25-35
David is easygoing, likable, and the kind of friend who’s always around when you need to vent. He has a good heart and means well, but he doesn’t dig too deep into situations. He can tell Moni might be trouble, but he brushes it off, assuming things will work themselves out.

Tray confides in him, but only partially, and David doesn’t press for more. Instead, he offers surface-level advice and tries to keep things light. He’s supportive, but not the type to challenge or confront—often choosing comfort over truth.

As things unfold, David remains on the outside looking in, unaware of how serious everything really is until it may be too late.

Character Traits:

Laid-back and approachable
Loyal but not deeply involved
Slightly naive
Avoids conflict
Well-meaning but passive

Casting Notes:
Looking for an actor with a natural, relaxed presence. Someone who feels authentic and easy to connect with, without needing to dominate the scene.
Must be available all 3 days, will only film one day.
Supporting $100/Day

  DOCTOR PARISH
 
 Age  45-55 
Gender: N/A

Doctor Parish is a great Listener with high emotional intelligence. Prioritizes patient advocacy  
Over a technical fix. 

Character Traits:

Calm 
Displays empathy
Genuinely cares about his/her patients

Will only be needed one day.
Supporting $75/Day

items.summary:
Casting Call: 🎥
Project Title: Decisions Are Never Black and White “Only The Blood”
Production Type: [Film/TV/Stage/Web Series]
Union Status: [Non-Union]
Compensation: [Paid]
Shooting Dates: June 22nd, 23rd and 24th
Location: Greensboro NC (Must be a local hire to Greensboro)
No Travel or Lodging provided

Only the Blood is a gripping psychological drama centered on twin sisters bound by blood—but divided by jealousy, desire, and betrayal.
Tenille has always dreamed of becoming a mother, but after facing the painful reality that she cannot conceive, she turns to the one person she trusts most—her identical twin, Moni. On the surface, Moni agrees to carry Tenille’s child out of love and loyalty. But beneath that decision lies a deeper, darker motive.
As old wounds resurface, Moni’s hidden resentment toward her sister begins to surface. What begins as an act of sacrifice quickly turns into manipulation, as Moni uses the surrogacy arrangement as leverage—blackmailing Tenille’s husband into an intimate relationship to satisfy her own desires and long-held jealousy.
Lines are crossed, trust is shattered, and the emotional stakes intensify as each character becomes entangled in a web of deception, power, and betrayal.
As secrets unfold, the sisters are forced to confront a painful truth: sometimes the deepest betrayals don’t come from strangers… they come from within the family.

TRAY

Age 25-35
Attractive, grounded, and outwardly devoted, Tray is the kind of man people trust instantly. He presents as a loving husband who wants to give his wife everything—especially the child she desperately longs for.

Beneath that surface, Tray is conflicted and emotionally weak when pressured. His need to “keep the peace” makes him vulnerable to manipulation. When Moni introduces blackmail into the equation, Tray finds himself trapped in a situation he never imagined—crossing moral lines he once believed he’d never approach.

He carries quiet guilt, often masking it with reassurance and affection toward Tenille. Tray is not a villain, but his inability to stand firm ultimately fuels the betrayal at the center of the story.

Personality Traits:
Charming, conflicted, passive under pressure, emotionally torn, protective but flawed

Key Notes for Casting:

Must be comfortable with on screen kissing, and implied sexual acts. No nudity.
Must be able to portray internal conflict and layered emotion

Strong chemistry required with both Tenille and Moni
Needs subtlety—his struggle is more internal than explosive
Should evoke empathy even while making questionable choices

Must be available all 3 days
Lead $150/Day
 
MONI

Age 25-35
Moni is Tenille’s identical twin—equally captivating on the outside, but emotionally far more complex beneath the surface. Where Tenille is open and trusting, Moni is guarded, calculating, and quietly driven by years of comparison and buried jealousy.

Agreeing to carry her sister’s child appears selfless, but for Moni, it’s an opportunity. Using charm, manipulation, and carefully applied pressure, she blackmails her sister’s husband into an intimate relationship—feeding a desire for control and validation that has long been unresolved.

Moni thrives in the shadows, presenting warmth and loyalty to her sister while orchestrating a hidden agenda. She is not outwardly villainous—her power lies in subtlety, restraint, and the ability to shift between sincerity and underlying menace.

Seeking an actress with strong range who can embody duality—someone who can play both loving sister and calculated manipulator, with emotional depth, intensity, and control.

Must be comfortable with on screen kissing, and implied sexual acts. No nudity

Must be available all 3 days
Lead $150/Day
 
TENILLE

Age 25-35
Tenille is warm, hopeful, and deeply driven by her desire to become a mother—something she wants more than anything. After struggling with infertility, she places her full trust in her identical twin sister, believing she has found the answer to her prayers. With unwavering faith, she reassures her husband that this journey will bring them closer and finally give them the family they’ve dreamed of.

Completely unaware of the manipulation unfolding around her, Tenille remains genuine, loving, and trusting—making her the emotional heart of the story. Her innocence and belief in the people closest to her heighten the tension, as the audience watches her unknowingly build her future on a fragile foundation of deception.

Seeking an actress who can portray sincerity, emotional openness, and quiet strength, with the ability to carry deep dramatic weight while remaining authentically grounded.

Must be available all 3 days
Supporting $100/Day
 

BRIDGETTE

Age 25-35
Bridgette is Moni’s close friend—loyal, observant, but somewhat detached when it comes to other people’s drama. She has a playful, sarcastic personality and often assumes people exaggerate or joke when they say outrageous things.

When Moni confides in her about the plan to sleep with Tray, Bridgette doesn’t take it seriously. She brushes it off as one of Moni’s wild, attention-seeking moments, laughing it away instead of recognizing the depth of what’s being said. Because of this, she never steps in or challenges Moni’s thinking.

Bridgette’s inaction isn’t rooted in malice—it’s a mix of disbelief, avoidance, and not wanting to involve herself in something that feels messy or unbelievable. However, her failure to speak up or question Moni ultimately makes her an unintended enabler in the situation.

Key Traits:

Playful, sarcastic
Emotionally detached from conflict
Avoidant when things get serious
Loyal, but not confrontational
Underestimates the seriousness of others’ actions

Role in Story:
Bridgette serves as a subtle reflection of how dangerous silence and dismissal can be. She represents the bystander who could have intervened—but didn’t, because she didn’t think it was real.

Must be available all 3 days, will only film one day.
 Supporting $100/Day

DAVID

Age 25-35
David is easygoing, likable, and the kind of friend who’s always around when you need to vent. He has a good heart and means well, but he doesn’t dig too deep into situations. He can tell Moni might be trouble, but he brushes it off, assuming things will work themselves out.

Tray confides in him, but only partially, and David doesn’t press for more. Instead, he offers surface-level advice and tries to keep things light. He’s supportive, but not the type to challenge or confront—often choosing comfort over truth.

As things unfold, David remains on the outside looking in, unaware of how serious everything really is until it may be too late.

Character Traits:

Laid-back and approachable
Loyal but not deeply involved
Slightly naive
Avoids conflict
Well-meaning but passive

Casting Notes:
Looking for an actor with a natural, relaxed presence. Someone who feels authentic and easy to connect with, without needing to dominate the scene.
Must be available all 3 days, will only film one day.
Supporting $100/Day

  DOCTOR PARISH
 
 Age  45-55 
Gender: N/A

Doctor Parish is a great Listener with high emotional intelligence. Prioritizes patient advocacy  
Over a technical fix. 

Character Traits:

Calm 
Displays empathy
Genuinely cares about his/her patients

Will only be needed one day.
Supporting $75/Day

Please email headshots, resume and reel (if available) by 9pm on Wednesday May 13th to nakesha.browncasting@gmail.com with character in the subject line.

items.text:
Ganz großes Kino für echte Sichtbarkeit 

Dass direkt unterhalb unseres gestrigen Vorstellungsvideos von Luis Sedig nun auch kino.de erscheint, zeigt genau, worum es bei Karrideo geht: Darsteller nicht nur online stellen, sondern strategisch sichtbar machen. 

Gestern haben wir Luis Sedig in unseren Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Kanälen vorgestellt. Externe Unterstützung erzeugt dabei oft mehr Glaubwürdigkeit als reine Eigenwerbung, weil der Algorithmus unabhängige Einordnung stärker wahrnimmt. 

Seit 2009 haben wir über 1500 kommerzielle Film-, Video- und Imageprojekte realisiert. Genau daraus entsteht die Relevanz, mit der wir Schützlinge, Coachies und Darstellerkollegen sichtbar, hörbar und professionell positionieren. 

Die Einblendung von kino.de ist für uns deshalb mehr als Zufall. Sie zeigt, wie wichtig kluge Platzierung, Videostrategie und externe Sichtbarkeit geworden sind. 

Auch Du kannst kostenfrei Teil davon werden. 

Schreib einfach ganz großes Kino in die Kommentare. 

Das Karrideo Team schaut hin und pusht dann auch Dich, Deine Arbeit oder Dein Profil mit zusätzlicher Aufmerksamkeit. 

Wer sichtbar werden will, braucht manchmal nur die richtige Bühne. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion mit großem Dank an Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation 

#Karrideo #LuisSedig #DarstellerPromotion #Sichtbarkeit #GanzGroßesKino

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE 🎭**

Hello everyone!

I’m producing **Jesus Hopped The A Train**, and I’m currently seeking an actress, **early 30s to early 40s**, for the role of **Mary Jane Hanrahan**.

Mary Jane is a tough-as-nails public defender who becomes deeply invested in Angel Cruz’s case. She’s sharp, driven, and carries that courtroom fire with a whole lot of heart underneath the armor.

This is a paid position. 

The production will be staged at **Dramatic Hall Theater in Peekskill, New York**, running **July 10th through July 26th**.

Please send your **resume** and **video reel link**, if you have one, to:

**juan@tmjentertainment.com**

Multi-role show crew person required for UK tour dates.
We are looking for a multi-role show crew person for our upcoming UK tour.​ This is NOT a 'road crew' position and does not require eg. the loading of heavy equipment into trucks.​ The tour runs 19th Oct 2026 - 29th November & 10th Jan - 4th April 2027.​ Show day jobs will include:​ Setting up and operating the merchandise stand, distribution of costumes and mic packs to dressing rooms, Light stage hand work, moving small pieces of furniture on and off stage, Assisting with prop handoffs in the wings, Packing down the merch stand, Performing a check of the dressing rooms for left costumes, mics and property.​ It is expected (on a standard 7.30pm show time) that you would arrive at the venue around 5pm and you would leave the venue around 11pm. (approx 6 working hours)​ Rate of pay £32 p/h + Expenses (travel and accommodation) ​FULL DETAILS at www.mjmmusic.net/casting ​Applications close 1st June, In the first instance please send your details to contact@mjmmusic.net​ - NO DMs

CASTING CALL - Cornwall Based Mid 30s to Mid 40s Woman  KEY DATES- 22nd to the 27th May (number of shoot days to be confirmed)

This is a paid role following along with reasonable expenses being covered.

Due to a last minute change in our cast we are looking once more for someone to fill this role 🙂

Experience is not required 

Julia, Lost in the Woods is a Surreal FairyTale, coming-of-age short film set in Cornwall.
We are looking for an actress to play Julia’s mother. 

The shoot will be taking place in both an exterior field shoot and an interior studio shoot!
The dates listed above are a safety bracket as our schedule is yet to be fully confirmed. 
The more local to Falmouth the better! 

Please shoot us a response through our email with headshots, any previous work, and a rundown of your availability. And we will be in contact asap! 

All the best 
Finn and Team

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
Casting 2 roles!
Title: Headshot

Genre: Horror

Role: 

**NICKY** — Female, early 20s. New to the city, trying to break into acting. Open, polite, eager to be taken seriously. The role lives in reactions: micro-expressions of discomfort she's actively trying to hide, the slow override of her instincts to be agreeable. We need an actress who can play "trying not to seem rude" with real specificity, not big fear. Mostly silent in the back half — must carry the camera on her face alone. Lead role.

**THE PHOTOGRAPHER** — Male, 30s–60s, open ethnicity. Warm, disarming, professional. The kind of person you'd trust on first meeting. Plays the role completely straight — NOT a creep, NOT menacing. The horror comes from how normal he seems. Stillness, quiet confidence, and a genuine smile are more important than any dark energy. Strong listener with precise line delivery. Lead role.

Production Company: CinemaRaven

Production Type: Indie

Contact Information: sam@cinemaravenproductions.com

Run Time: Short

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: I'll send a script for a video audition. Hoping to have this cast by early June. 

Shooting Schedule: June 24-26 (1 rehearsal day TBD, 2 shooting days

Filming Location: Broomfield CO

Project Description: Logline: A young aspiring actress answers a Craigslist ad for free professional headshots and discovers that the photographer's studio hides something far worse than a scam.

items.title: Casting 2 roles!

items.text:
**Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

**PROJECT DESCRIPTION: **

Short-form workplace sitcom that takes place in a “government agency”.  The project will be filmed in a similar style to The Office, Parks & Rec.

**LOGLINE:**

Each day serendipity brings people from all walks of life together at the Denver DMV. A place where those behind the counter are just as annoyed and bewildered as those crammed into plastic chairs awaiting their number to be called.

**FILMING DATE:** TBD

We will be filming 2 days over a weekend either July 18-19 OR Aug. 1-2 in central Denver

**RATE: ** $200/day + 20% agency (10hr)

**USAGE:**  Web, YouTube, Social

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:**  Neato Pictures

**ROLES: ** 

**Janet (F, 60s)**

A local has-been actress now working at the DMV for the last 10 years.  Long after local fame as the ‘84 - ‘86 face of a local dealership, Janet still believes her acting break is just around the corner. Personally driven but not a team player, Janet only works to collect a check.   She is trying to hold onto her youth but her flamboyance often barely covers her insecurities.  

**Carl (M, 50s)**

A no-frills, serious, deliberate man who shows up on time and does everything with purpose. He’s a “lifer” at the DMV having been there over 16 years and doesn’t enjoy change. With a military background, Carl is a man of strict order, tradition, and pride in his work. Rumor has it, Carl was honorably discharged over a chronic case of lock-jaw due to stress. 

**SUBMISSIONS:**  By Monday 5/18

If you have great comedic timing and feel like you might be our Janet or Carl, we'd love to hear from you. 

Please email** Brandy@neatopictures.com** for audition requirements and script.  Thanks for your interest!
items.summary:
**Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

**PROJECT DESCRIPTION: **

Short-form workplace sitcom that takes place in a “government agency”.  The project will be filmed in a similar style to The Office, Parks & Rec.

**LOGLINE:**

Each day serendipity brings people from all walks of life together at the Denver DMV. A place where those behind the counter are just as annoyed and bewildered as those crammed into plastic chairs awaiting their number to be called.

**FILMING DATE:** TBD

We will be filming 2 days over a weekend either July 18-19 OR Aug. 1-2 in central Denver

**RATE: ** $200/day + 20% agency (10hr)

**USAGE:**  Web, YouTube, Social

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:**  Neato Pictures

**ROLES: ** 

**Janet (F, 60s)**

A local has-been actress now working at the DMV for the last 10 years.  Long after local fame as the ‘84 - ‘86 face of a local dealership, Janet still believes her acting break is just around the corner. Personally driven but not a team player, Janet only works to collect a check.   She is trying to hold onto her youth but her flamboyance often barely covers her insecurities.  

**Carl (M, 50s)**

A no-frills, serious, deliberate man who shows up on time and does everything with purpose. He’s a “lifer” at the DMV having been there over 16 years and doesn’t enjoy change. With a military background, Carl is a man of strict order, tradition, and pride in his work. Rumor has it, Carl was honorably discharged over a chronic case of lock-jaw due to stress. 

**SUBMISSIONS:**  By Monday 5/18

If you have great comedic timing and feel like you might be our Janet or Carl, we'd love to hear from you. 

Please email** Brandy@neatopictures.com** for audition requirements and script.  Thanks for your interest!
items.title: **Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Looking for 2 Black Men for short film

May 16th and 17th 
RIVERSIDE, CA 

Requirements:
•Must be the same exact height
Can be twins or two individuals of identical height/build
 •Age 20-30
• Strong physical awareness and ability to perform slow, precise movements
•Comfortable performing in full costume (all black wardrobe, ski masks)

Character Description:
•Silent, eerie, and controlled
•Move with purpose minimal but impactful
•Almost mechanical or in sync with one another

Additional Info:
•Filming will require coordination and timing between both performers
•No dialogue; performance is entirely physical

Please submit:
• Height (must match partner if applying as pair)
•Recent photos

**Unpaid but Meal and Credit will be provided

Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com

items.text:
## **Free acting taster class!**

**VISIT ACTORSCAFE.CO.UK AND CLICK THE FREE TASTER CLASS TAB.**
## **SIGN UP TO OUR SPotlight Listed COURSES TODAY, SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICKLY!**

**For all ages 18-80! and all acting abilities from novice to professional. Students are achieving their Spotlight accreditation, landing acting agents, and are developing strong confidence and realism in their craft.**

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

Dates: May 2026

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

*ALEX SCANLAN. CAM ACTOR'S AGENCY - "Having visited the Actor's Cafe on three separate occasions now, I can really see the great work it produces."*

*CARL PROCTOR. CASTING DIRECTOR -"Everyone seemed to get a lot out of it. A nice group who seem to benefit hugely from you courses."*

*PAUL GIDDINGS. BBC TV DIRECTOR - "Thanks for having us at The Actors Cafe and for creating such a relaxed, positive and supportive environment."*

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

items.text: Come see Jerry's Girls at No Square Theatre in Laguna Beach!

sharedPost.text:
Don't miss the wonderful world of Jerry's Girls! Come join us for a fun night out where you'll be sure to be laughing and humming along to some of the greatest golden age musical theatre numbers! 

Tickets available at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

In this dynamic musical revue, three Divas and three singing and dancing women celebrate the music of Jerry Herman, highlighting the broad spectrum of thrilling material he wrote specifically for female performers. This Broadway hit features all the best songs for women from such immortal musicals as Mame, Hello Dolly!, Milk and Honey, Mack and Mabel, A Day in Hollywood/A Night in the Ukraine, and La Cage Aux Folles.

It affectionately celebrates his special gift for writing songs that capture the true spirit of the American musical theatre. The all-female cast will remind us of how Jerry Herman has given voice to some of the most iconic roles, ballads and show-stoppers ever written for Broadway. A winner of the Tony, Grammy, Olivier, and Drama Desk Awards, Jerry Herman is the master tunesmith of our time.

items.text:
Hi Everyone! My name is Nick, and I am a former actor now pursuing a doctorate in clinical psychology. I am conducting a research study titled “Trauma in Training: The Psychological Consequences of Abusive Practices in Acting Programs,” which examines the impact of abusive practices on actors’ mental health during their training. I am currently seeking participants for a survey. If you are interested, participation in this study will involve completing a demographic questionnaire and three brief mental health measures. You will also have the option to provide additional details about your experiences if you wish to share them. Completion of the survey and questionnaires should take approximately 20 minutes.

**Even though it focuses on actors, I am also looking for non-actors to participate. **

To participate in this study, you must be at least 18 years of age, reside in the United States, be able to provide informed consent, and be able to read and understand English. All survey responses will be anonymous. Participation is voluntary and can be discontinued at any time and for any reason without consequences.

Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could share this survey with others. The more responses I get, the better!

**What are the risks of participating?**

Participants who have experienced physical, emotional, and/or sexual abuse may experience psychological discomfort and/or distress in the process of answering questions related to past experiences.

**What are the benefits of the study?**

There is no direct benefit to participating in this study. However, you will nonetheless contribute to existing research on the psychological issues facing actors, particularly during their training. This may be useful in developing more effective training methods and mental health resources for individuals working and training in the performing arts.

If you have any questions about this, feel free to DM me. Thanks in advance for your time!

items.text:
Rah Rah Theatre Company is currently looking for warm, engaging male actor/singers for a touring summer show bringing music and laughter to care homes and community venues.

This is a feel-good, people-focused role, so strong audience interaction and a genuine connection with older audiences is key.

📅 Production Dates: 8th July – 21st August 2026
🎭 Rehearsals: 18th, 24th, 30th June; 2nd & 6th July
💷 Daily rate of £120 plus holiday pay at 12.07% (approx. £134.48 total per day)

Please email Spotlight/CV and details to:
📧 [rahrahtheatre@hotmail.com](mailto:rahrahtheatre@hotmail.com)

items.text:
CASTING CALL: YEAR 12 MEDIA SHORT FILM/UNPAID

LOOKING FOR MALE ACTORS 
Title: Guardian@ngel

Type: short film

Role descriptions:
Fan, any ethnicity, appearing age 35-40
CEO, appearing age 40-50
Siwoo, appearing age 19-25
Ideally these characters are Korean, but anyone of East Asian decent is welcome to audition, CEO and Manager are primarily faceless and Siwoo is more just to take a few photos for a “scandal” 

Location: Frankston area, Melbourne 

Dates: Filming will be during the 27th of June – 13th of July, it shouldn’t take more than four days to film everything. Time of day isn’t the most relevant so we can also film in afternoons! I’m happy to negotiate when filming takes place within this time period. The character of Angel has the largest time commitment.

Apply: If interested please contact me before the 15th of May by leaving a comment on this post or contacting me at misramiranda@gmail.com for further information!

Basic plot: The film is a psychological horror that looks at parasocial relationships within the K-Pop industry. Focusing on the main character, a female idol with the stage name “Angel” as one of her fan’s develops a parasocial relationship with her that ends up crossing the line. Offstage, “Angel” is under pressure from her company’s CEO and Manager to fit beauty standards regarding her weight.

items.text:
📣 CASTING CALL 📣

HoneyVic Productions is casting for our annual Playwriting for Social Change Festival — Acts of Breaking Silence — running July 15–19 at the American Theatre of Actors in NYC.

We have four open roles we're casting in The Reckoning (a searing examination of racial injustice and reparations) and The Basement (a moving exploration of mental illness and silence in the Black community).
                                  ===Open Roles===
1. Slave Wife (The Reckoning) — Gullah-inflected dialect, defiant and lyrical. 

2. Tulsa Survivor (The Reckoning) — eyewitness to the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre (male or female) 

3. The Woman (The Reckoning) — a Black mother, sharp and unflinching on the cost of generational inequality 

4. Cynthia (The Basement)— the emotional heart of The Basement, a devoted mother in her mid-50s

Auditions: Sunday, May 17 at 520 Spaces, NYC (Zoom auditions also available before May 17)

$150 travel reimbursement paid at the end of the run.

We're looking for actors passionate about social change who thrive in collaborative, ensemble-driven work.  If this is you, email us at info@honeyvicproductions.org.

Tag a friend who needs to see this. 💛

#NYCCasting #CastingCall #BlackTheatre #SocialJusticeTheatre #HoneyVicProductions #playwrightingforsocialchange

https://honeyvicproductions.org/acts-of-breaking-silence/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ACTS OF BREAKING SILENCE Where Silence Ends, Truth Begins TheBasement The Basement by Reggie byReggieFayton Fay Fayton Homeless Not Hopeless by Juanda Hall The Reckoning by Shahid Hopson & Juanda Hall Silent Farms by Mobin Aslani'

items.text:
Seeking TFP Model // Saturday, May 16 // Glendale, CA

We are doing a day of Glam Looks at our Glendale studio on Saturday, May 16and we're looking for a TFP model to do 1 of the 4 attached looks (looks will be matched with talent). The session will take about 2-3 hours and include full makeup and a portrait session. You will walk with 3 retouched images and the proofs from your session with full usage rights.

The images attached are all reference images and not our work. The Lisa Frank style image with the glam girl popping through the backdrop is AI generated and is being used only for reference. We use AI for brainstorming but not for shooting or finishing images.

For samples of our actual work, please refer to [thayuphoto.com](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fthayuphoto.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExNE5US2Z5SW1ybG00YWJGbHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4Xvdw_PJjGrNKZVJKE9kwYO_gyxSLUVX41VX578mH42naBrtGeFRWY6m9eYQ_aem_30m4sa5uHXcsW8voSlONjg&h=AUDJ4y_5IpGxoPuxrbHCYx6oTmP-loB5Mi5mqPv3N9uFvMWqWjrGEKBe-sRR9tU-zgE1TeUfVHlAyWcBsGOVmf44y5XNfZB0K0wwUkm7Kvan5uCUCbA2ucjtyWzV1DkVwy7hkFgph2WTIBxDgjQyyg&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUBTM2FPSkXTzXo3R3jjfk__BPFpPTRQjh1qeuBVyC3L1rXy2hemoY3UQkbdNvLY-mf8yCjJ-bRydq73hdcHA0_vBynJZkr35We3SpWlCfGgmYCibSys7Fa-OZ5x7O5_REYoxpoe1Pu-kwqgLEUrOBU5er7ld5i524p-SRM3Xtf9_ao) or our IG, @thayuphoto. Reviews of shooting experiences with us can be found on our website.

When reaching out, please include a headshot and a full body shot as well as links to your portfolio and IG. Of course, if you're at the start of your career, please send the best materials you have. We cast based on looks and energy, not on the cost of the camera that was used on your last shoot.

If you have any questions, DM me directly or leave them in the comments.

Thank you for considering it!

Hi everyone. I’m urgently casting lead roles for a vertical drama series shooting in London.

Filming 18-20th may. You must be able to do allll these dates !!!!!

YOU MUSTTTTT BE ABLE TO GET A SELF TAPE TO ME BY TOMORROW MIDDAY IF YOU APPLY AND ARE SELECTED - don’t apply if you can’t do this!!!!!! The script is very short 

ROLE 1: MALE. Jude (lead) 25-35 years old
£300-350 per day tbc so between £900-1,050 for 3 days
Ref: Edward Lewis from pretty woman. A calm powerful man posing as a driver but secretly a ceo.

Role 2: MALE. travis - antagonist. Age 25-35 
£200-250 per day. So 600-750 for 3 days
Ref: Patrick Bateman from American psycho.  Wealthy, obsessive controlling finance.

Role 3: MALE. James 25-35 years
£130 per day so 390 for 3 days.
Loyal assistant to Jude. 

ROLE 4: FEMALE. Kate (lead) age 20-30
£300-350 per day for 3 days so £900-1,050 tbc
Character ref: Anastasia steel from 50 shades of grey 

Role 5: FEMALE. corrine. Age 45-55
£130 per day so £390 for 3 days
Ref: cold mother obsessed with status and perfection 

Please DM me  if available. I must have headshots / spotlight link to forward you

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
I'm looking for Korean hip hop dances (K-dance) in Vancouver for a proof-of-concept pitch video.

Can be male or female, ideally the dancer is also an actor and can speak Korean (language). Dancers can be any ethnicity. Looking for great, sharp dancers (think Noze, Narae Kim, etc...) and is able to learn choreography from video.

This is to pitch a drama episodic series/webseries as a co-production with Korea.

If interested, send your photos (headshoot and full body), resume and any video you have to Ronald at castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. Further details shared with shortlisted applicants.

Thank you for reading!

items.text:
Casting Call – Vancouver Laser & Skin Care Centre
Hi everyone!

We are currently casting **one female talent** for a series of educational videos for our new website.

## **Role Needed**
* **Role:** Female talent
* **Age:** 30-50
* **Ethnicity:** Caucasian
* **Language:** Native-level English fluency
* **Preferred (not required):** Experience filming educational, corporate, or introduction-style videos

## **Project Details**
* **Deliverables: **25 videos (approx. 1 minute each)
* **Shoot Duration:** 3 - 4 hours (approx.)
* **Shoot Date:** One day between **May 6 – 15** (Exact date can be discussed)
* **Wardrobe & Makeup:** Not provided. Please wear light-colored business-casual attire.

## **Compensation**
* **$1,000 flat rate**
* **Snacks & coffee provided**

## **How to Apply**

Please email the following to **ben@vancouverlaser.com **

**Subject line:** *Website Video + [Your Name]*

**Please include:**
* Recent headshot taken within the last 6 months
* Resume
* Demo videos (if available)

**Please note: Facebook DMs will not be accepted.**

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
We look forward to your submissions!

items.text:
Hi, I'm Dani, a film photographer and part of Flare, an analog photography collective for women and dissidences with presence in Chile, France and Canada. 

We run open calls, photography gatherings and collaborative editorials where different artistic practices intersect — and we're hoping to bring it all together in a photobook in the future. We're now looking to connect with people in Berlin and build something here too — so if you're into analog photography, this is your invitation 💛

This Sunday May 10th we're opening a Mother's Day call: desired motherhood, not-so-desired, imposed, dissident. All perspectives welcome — emotional, conceptual, abstract, entirely your own. Analog format only.

Form closes Sunday May 10th:
🕛 12:00 Santiago & Valdivia, Chile
🕛 12:00 Toronto, Canada 
🕕 19:00 Toulouse, France 
🕕 19:00 Berlin, Germany 

📋 English form: https://forms.gle/j2DnPfsZRfwqm8je6
📋 Español: https://forms.gle/CELnomRbLHqZ2EB26
📋 Français: https://forms.gle/4dnp2pZSfec7LDTh7 

✶

Photography: https://www.instagram.com/jopipemi

✶

https://www.instagram.com/flare.analogo/
